_comment: Example Claude Code hooks fragment: crystallize first, then Operator crystal-bridge. Trust/review hooks in the harness UI before relying on them. Absolute paths to binaries recommended if NVM/PATH is unreliable in hook processes.

hooks.command: agent-crystallize hook --harness claude-code --event SessionStart; operator crystal-bridge --event SessionStart --harness claude
agent-crystallize hook --harness claude-code --event Stop; operator crystal-bridge --event Stop
